summary: Added crystal as a 4th volumetric 3D mode: two new shapes (crystalCluster, geode) in the volumetric generator, crystal-specific shaders with quantized/faceted displacement and two-axis rotation, a crystalField geometry system matching the pointCloud interface, and registration in main.ts with 0.8x point scaling. All 54 US-044 tests pass, full suite (780 tests) green, TypeScript and build clean.
